rationale: The citing paper explicitly states it extends “customer equity and customer valuation research” and focuses on how acquisition actions affect customer asset value/CLV, while the cited paper (“Valuing Customers”) is a core customer-based valuation framework centered on CLV, retention, margins, and acquisition costs. The construct and purpose overlap is strong (customer valuation, CLV drivers, firm/customer asset value), suggesting this is plausibly a foundational source rather than an incidental background mention. Given that, this pair should be kept for full relation judgment.
